sample_problem_rows.teacher_comment_3line:
Strength: clean detail.
Weakness: weaker secondary cues.
Verdict: selected because cleaner detail kept it ahead.

Strength: clean detail.
Weakness: weaker secondary cues.
Verdict: selected because cleaner detail kept it ahead.

Strength: soft detail.
Weakness: weaker secondary cues.
Verdict: selected because softer detail trailed the stronger selected frame.

Strength: clean detail.
Weakness: weak subject emphasis.
Verdict: not selected because weaker weak subject emphasis outweighed clean detail.

Strength: clear visual strengths.
Weakness: The frame fell short once detail clarity and overall appeal gave higher-ranked images the edge.
Verdict: not selected because weaker The frame fell short once detail clarity and overall appeal gave higher-ranked images the edge outweighed clear visual strengths.

Strength: clean detail.
Weakness: weak subject emphasis.
Verdict: not selected because cleaner detail helped, but weaker aesthetic appeal left it below the higher-ranked frame.

Strength: clean detail and clear subject emphasis.
Weakness: clean detail.
Verdict: not selected because cleaner detail helped, but it still stayed below the higher-ranked frame.

Strength: clean detail.
Weakness: weak subject emphasis.
Verdict: not selected because weaker weak subject emphasis outweighed clean detail.

Strength: Technical and aesthetic evidence gives the image some usable strengths.
Weakness: soft detail.
Verdict: not selected because weaker soft detail outweighed Technical and aesthetic evidence gives the image some usable strengths.

Strength: clean detail.
Weakness: weak subject emphasis.
Verdict: not selected because cleaner detail helped, but weaker aesthetic appeal left it below the higher-ranked frame.

notes: generic_baseline_row_count uses broad abstract/template phrase matching such as overall appeal, weaker secondary cues, and higher-ranked frame.
grounding_fail_row_count uses a stricter subset focused on visibly ungrounded placeholders or malformed verdict wording.
proposed_visible_verdict_line is a deterministic A-cut rewrite tied only to the current Strength and Weakness lines.
